metadata.description: 7 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: multi-agent build pipeline, documentation, code review, QA testing, codebase-anchored decision discussion, frontend design, and dashboard. v4.5.1 makes all harness subagents inherit the parent session model (per-role sonnet/haiku downgrades retired; the session model is the single control knob). v4.5.0 adds /harness-think (Surveyor) — a read-only codebase-anchored decision/feasibility command whose cite-or-abstain grounding is A/B-measured KEEP on both an in-author and an independent-author held-out split (M8, margin +4 each). v4.4.0 adds whitepaper-alignment: observation-grounding is now A/B-measured KEEP on both an in-author and an independent-author held-out split (+ M4 untestable KEEP), plus Conductor mode, a Curator agent (learned-rules → AGENTS.md), deterministic guard hooks, and an eval + golden-regression suite. v4.3.0 added Observation Grounding (observe rendered/executable output, not just exit-0), a runtime Stop hook, and a capability-escalation ladder.

plugins.name: claudex
plugins.description: 7 harness commands with 29 specialized agent prompts + 1 helper. v4.5.1 — all harness subagents inherit the parent session model; per-role sonnet/haiku downgrades retired (session model is the single control knob, so an Opus session runs every agent on Opus). v4.5.0 — /harness-think (Surveyor): read-only codebase-anchored decision/feasibility discussion; cite-or-abstain grounding A/B-measured KEEP on both an in-author and an independent-author held-out split (M8, +4 each); 0 new agent prompts; Codex mirror. v4.4.0 — Whitepaper-alignment (measured): observation-grounding A/B-measured KEEP (both an in-author and an independent-author held-out split) + M4 untestable KEEP, 0 false-positives; Conductor mode (/harness --quick); a Curator agent (learned-rules → AGENTS.md); a Trajectory Reporter; deterministic PreToolUse/commit guard hooks; Builder/Refiner DoD-Check; Summary Residual-Risk; an eval + golden-regression suite under tests/. v4.3.0 — Observation Grounding + Capability Escalation: a runtime Stop hook (claudex's first runtime-enforced completion entrance), observe-the-rendered-output in the verify chain (exit-0 = well-formed, not correct), a §5.1 capability-escalation ladder at the 3-retry ceiling, context-first phase decomposition, QA UNTESTABLE state. Transferred procedures (origin: fablize/prometheus); effect not yet A/B-measured. v4.2.0 — Completion Gate protocol. Commands: /harness (SINGLE/TEAM + Phase Verifier + Sentinel + Auditor), /harness-docs, /harness-review, /harness-qa (Playwright), /design, /claude-dashboard.
